reviews.review_description:
not sure if the servers are just no longer working and they didnt bother to remove the app or something
but so far everytime i have tried to enter lately it is stuck on the first loading screen and never loads.
Anticipating this release for awhile and can’t wait to share it with everyone!
It’s so laggy and you keep on getting logged out

We experienced periodic microphone issue. Sometimes, I would not hear my friends even I stood right next to them. I needed to close the app, and restart. Sometimes, I even needed to reboot the headset if we initially joined from party, and switched from party voice to app voice. One occasion, I couldn't watch or hear the music from the screen but my friend was able to.

Updated: I am suspecting may be I recently switched Air Link on. I turned it off completely and will see if my issue resolve, and will update again.
it freezes after choosing an avatar
Very fun but strange that the singer cannot hear his/her own voice

reviews.review_title: Wish the YouTube karaoke tracks worked
reviews.review_description: Videos with the lyrics don't work in studio or party mode. This app has the potential to be amazing and there's no other kareoke apps I've seen on vr. Please get the android app going and make it so the player can import YouTube tracks.
Very nice atmosphere and features. Looking forward to try to add my own songs from YouTube. Unable to find the app on iOS App Store yet.
